With our Global Work Platform™, companies can hire, pay, and manage employees in 185+ countries—removing risk, red tape, and guesswork from global growth. Backed by more than a decade of local expertise and compliance leadership, Pebl is built to move as fast as your ambitions, whether you’re bringing on your first international teammate or scaling a workforce across continents. Our AI-powered, human-led platform integrates seamlessly with HRIS, HCM, and ATS systems and delivers instant, vetted answers in 50+ languages—so you stay compliant and confident wherever you grow. We’ve helped thousands of businesses—from Fortune 500s to rapid-growth start-ups—scale strategically around the world. Consistently named a leader in global Employer of Record (EOR) services, Pebl holds more employment licenses than any other EOR and is rated #1 for compliance on G2. With Pebl, companies everywhere can hire great talent anywhere. jobs.fullDescription: requirements at the appropriate level while minimizing the pain to get — and stay — there. Cybersecurity compliance is all we do. We work to help DOD contractors and suppliers cut through the complexity and confusion to protect their businesses, suppliers/partners, the U.S. Department of Defense and this nation from the ever-present, always-changing threat of cyberattacks. CyberSheath at a glance Involved in the first and every version of DOD cybersecurity initiatives since 2008 Services hundreds of U.S. Defense Industrial Base (DIB) customers across manufacturing, engineering, construction, architecture and design and more Many successful DOD and Prime audits of our services Thousands of NIST SP 800-171 assessments and implementations completed 12+ years of NIST SP 800-171/DFARS/CMMC cybersecurity solutions 12+ years servicing Foreign Ownership, Control or Influence (FOCI) customers AOS-G member/GCC High license eligible Cyber-AB RPO Create a Job Alert Level-up your career by having opportunities at CyberSheath sent directly to your inbox.
